# YOUR CODE HERE
def main():
    import sys
    input = sys.stdin.read
    data = input().split()
    
    N = int(data[0])
    P = list(map(int, data[1:N+1]))
    Q = int(data[N+1])
    queries = list(map(int, data[N+2:]))
    
    pos = [0] * (N + 1)  # 1-based indexing for person numbers
    for i in range(N):
        pos[P[i]] = i + 1  # position from front (1-based)
    
    results = []
    for i in range(Q):
        A = queries[2*i]
        B = queries[2*i + 1]
        if pos[A] < pos[B]:
            results.append(str(A))
        else:
            results.append(str(B))
    
    print("\n".join(results))

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
